title: AtlaSent Sigstore identity allowlist
description: Accepted OIDC subject regexps for cosign-keyless-signed artifacts, per role. Verifiers pass the relevant regexp to cosign verify-blob's --certificate-identity-regexp; this decouples SDK builds from workflow-path changes.

issued_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at which this allowlist was published.

role.description: Signing role this identity is permitted for. R1 is split by artifact class (engine, console, openapi, trust-root); R4 covers the policy-pack publishing workflow after the Phase 4 cosign migration.

identity_regexp.description: Regular expression matched against the Sigstore cert's OIDC subject. Operators MUST anchor with ^ and $ to prevent prefix/suffix smuggling.

valid_from.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at which this identity becomes acceptable.

valid_until.description: RFC 3339 timestamp after which this identity is no longer accepted. Null means open-ended (current).
